title: synoptReg
description: R package for computing synoptic climate classifications and spatial regionalization of environmental variables using gridded atmospheric data.

title: climaemet
description: R package (rOpenSpain project) to download and visualize climate data from AEMET (Spanish Meteorological Agency) API.

title: Pyrenees Climate
description: High-resolution climate projections for the Pyrenees combining dynamical downscaling with observational data to characterize future climate scenarios at local and regional scale.

title: Compound Events
description: Research on dry-hot compound events in the Pyrenees under current and future climate conditions, assessing changes in frequency, intensity, and duration.
